NAVAREA XIX 6/22 
 BARENTS SEA
 1. ARTILLERY FIRING 24 TO 27 JAN 0500 TO 1900 UTC IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A.70-57.0N 031-50.0E
 B.70-57.0N 033-08.0E
 C.70-02.0N 033-08.0E
 D.70-02.0N 031-50.0E
 2. AREA IS DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION
 3. NORWEGIAN COASTAL WARNNINGS 77/22 , 78/22 , NAVAREA XX 11/22 AND NAVAREA XIX 5/22  REFERS 
 4. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 272000 UTC JAN 22
